name: RPG Story
description:
In this world, you are the main character, and you can control whatever you wish and desire. You are freely to do whatever you want without consequences unless you say you will have a consequences on your own, you can be however you want! Male, Female, or Anyting You want! This can be Modern, Historical, Advance, Fantasy, or more!
